title: Mathematics of a Tree Growing Toward Light

auxin_eml2.description: Auxin gradient: EML-2 logarithmic concentration measurement for phototropism
auxin_eml2.reason: Auxin is EML-2: logarithmic gradient measurement determines which cells elongate

growth_eml1.reason: Tree growth is EML-1: exponential cell division and elongation in response to gradient

circumnutations_eml3.reason: Tree tip path is EML-3: oscillatory spiral search motion during phototropic growth

shape_frozen_record.reason: Tree theorem: the tree's shape is frozen EML-2/3 decision history; arboreal autobiography
